members.name: Tom Mboya Awinda
members.role: RN Skills Lab & Classroom Instructor - Nairobi
members.bio: RN with a diploma in Community Health. Teaches Levels 3-5 and skills lab. Works in the Medical-Surgical Unit at a major Nairobi hospital.

members.name: Nancy Mugah, RN
members.bio: RN with a KMTC diploma. Leads skills and classroom instruction at FAHI Voi. Also serves part-time at the River Jordan Level Four Medical Centre.

members.name: Patricia Mungai, B.Ed. Science
members.bio: Experienced Biology and Math teacher. Supports Anatomy & Physiology and KCSE upgrading. Holds caregiving certification from FAHI.

members.name: Veronicah Kiage, RN
members.bio: Medical-Surgical Nurse with 7+ years' experience. AHA-certified BLS provider. Teaches Levels 3-5 at FAHI Voi while working full-time at Moi County Referral Hospital.

members.name: Wilson Owuor, BSN, RN
members.bio: Veteran nurse with 20+ years' experience. AHA-certified BLS instructor and founder of Kemrif Hospital. Leads academic instruction and mentorship at FAHI Nairobi.

members.name: Carolyne Gatwiri, BSN, RN
members.bio: Registered Nurse with 13+ years' experience. Leads FAHI's Hybrid Program and works full-time at Meru Level Five Hospital, combining clinical insights with teaching.

members.name: Kones Chebet Sharon, BSN, RN
members.bio: ICU nurse and TVETA-certified trainer. Leads FAHI Mombasa academics, emergency response, and skills lab training. Also serves as Lead AHA BLS & ACLS Instructor.

members.name: George Isaboke, BSN, RN
members.bio: Medical-Surgical Nurse with 12+ years' experience. Teaches Anatomy & Physiology in the Hybrid Program—full-time nurse at Machakos Level Five Hospital.

members.name: Josephine Mwashao, BSc MLS, Dip. MLS, ASCPI (USA)
members.role: Tutor & ASCPI Prep Trainer - FAHI Voi
members.bio: Medical Lab Technologist with 8+ years' experience. Leads ASCPI prep classes and core lab subjects. Works full-time at Moi County Referral Hospital.

members.name: Joshua Nkomo, M.Ed., B.Ed., Diploma in ICT
members.role: Hybrid Tutor - ICT, Basic & Advanced Computer Applications
members.bio: Joshua Nkomo is a dedicated educator with expertise in ICT and humanities, holding a Master's degree in Education, a Bachelor's degree in Education, and a Diploma in ICT.

members.name: Jeniffer Saruh, BSN, RN, AHA BLS Certified Provider
members.role: Principal Tutor, FAHI Voi Learning Centre
members.bio: Registered Nurse with 20+ years' clinical and leadership experience. Former Sub-County Nurse with expertise in emergency childbirth and newborn care. Currently serves as Principal Tutor at FAHI Voi.

members.name: Marc Gordon Sobukwe, MSN, BSN, RN, CEO & Program Director
members.role: Certified CNA Trainer (USA) | TVETA Certified Trainer
members.bio: Marc Gordon Sobukwe is a seasoned RN licensed in the USA and Kenya. He currently works as a travel nurse in the United States and leads FAHI as CEO and Program Director.

members.name: Daisy Asadhi, B.Ed. (Special Needs), CNA, AHA BLS Certified Instructor
members.bio: Daisy Asadhi is an experienced CNA and Administrative Manager at FAHI Nairobi Learning Centre. She also works as a CNA with a leading hospital in Nairobi.

members.name: Felix Onyango
members.role: Emergency Care & Skills Lab Coordinator - Mombasa
members.bio: CNA and BLS Instructor with a background in electronics. Works at a Level Six hospital and manages emergency and lab training at FAHI.

members.name: Lydiah Mwakiwiwi, Dip. Bus. Admin, CNA
members.bio: CNA and BLS Instructor. Oversees operations, placements, and skills assessments at FAHI Mombasa. Coordinates home-based care in the Lower Coast region.

members.name: Derrick Otwori, AHA BLS Certified Instructor, CNA, Diploma in Journalism
members.role: Admission, Hybrid Learning, and Registry Coordinator
members.bio: Derrick Otwori is a CNA and Admission, Hybrid Learning & Registry Coordinator at FAHI while also working full-time as a Professional Caregiver at a Level Five hospital.

members.name: Rev. Silvanus Mwakoma, B.A. Theology
members.bio: Rev. Silvanus Mwakoma is an ordained Anglican priest. He oversees hybrid class schedules, student counseling, mentorship, conflict resolution, and the issuance of clinical logbooks.
